fresh_spike_desc: Short-term volume explosion (last 12 weeks) significantly higher than baseline. Indicates new institutional interest or a breakout attempt.
base_building_desc: Sustained high volume over the last year compared to the previous year. Indicates long-term accumulation before a potential major move.
volume_ratio_desc: Multiplier of current volume vs historical. <0>2.0x</0> = Double normal volume.
drop_percent_desc: Decline from 2-year high. <0>-50%</0> = Half peak price.
drop_warning: Warning: Drops >90% often indicate broken/speculative stocks.
high_insider: High (>50%): Good "Skin in the game", but low float (risky volatility).
low_insider: Low (<1%): Higher liquidity, but management may lack conviction.
no_results: No results found yet. Start a scan to find opportunities.
no_tickers_cached: No tickers cached yet. Run a scan to populate lists.
showing_cache_note: Showing cache from last scan. New markets require a run to appear.
ticker_update_note: ℹ️ Tickers are automatically fetched and updated during a scan. If a ticker is missing, try running a scan for that market.
support_msg: If you enjoy using this tool, consider buying me a coffee or donating crypto. Your support keeps the updates coming! 🙏
disclaimer_text: Disclaimer: This tool identifies high volume activity. It does NOT provide buy/sell signals. Not financial advice.
